message.content: {"cases":[{"input_lines":["{\"alpha\": [3.1415, 2.71828, 3.1415], \"beta\": [], \"delta\": [3.1415], \"gamma\": [2.71828, 2.71828]}"],"focus":"Multi-market case with empty market and duplicate values to exercise deterministic pairwise rounds and stability across adjacent merges."},{"input_lines":["{\"single\": [1e308, -1e308, 1.234567890123456, 1.234567890123456, 5e-324, 2.2250738585072014e-308, 0.0]}"],"focus":"Single-market extreme and high-precision floats (very large, very small, duplicates) to check numeric precision preservation and correct in-place-free behavior."},{"input_lines":["{\"a\": [2.0, 1.0], \"b\": [2.0, 1.0], \"c\": [], \"d\": [1.0, 2.0], \"e\": [1.0]}"],"focus":"Odd number of markets including empty list and identical value distributions to validate deterministic lexicographic merge scheduling and stability when merging equal elements from different markets."}]}
